mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, base_price AS basePrice FROM product WHERE id = #{productId}

SELECT og.id AS optionGroupId, og.name AS optionGroupName, ov.id AS optionValueId, ov.value AS optionValue FROM option_group og JOIN option_value ov ON ov.option_group_id = og.id WHERE og.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY og.sort_order

SELECT s.id AS skuId, s.sku_code AS skuCode, s.price AS price, s.stock AS stock,
og.name AS optionGroup, ov.value AS optionValue
FROM sku s JOIN sku_option so ON so.sku_id = s.id JOIN option_value ov ON ov.id = so.option_value_id JOIN option_group og ON og.id = ov.option_group_id
WHERE s.product_id = #{productId}
